title: MCU SD-card datalogger benchmark fixture
representative_intent: MCU datalogger with USB, SPI flash, microSD and RTC

requirements.text: Represent MCU SPI bus connection to microSD/flash with signal and pull-up review evidence.
Provide RTC and backup/auxiliary power review evidence with non-claims for timekeeping accuracy.
Connect USB power/debug/data interface and 3.3 V logic rail current-budget evidence.
Attach proof-pack, KiCad, manufacturing export, signal integrity, current budget and benchmark coverage evidence.

non_claims: This benchmark fixture is repository coverage evidence, not data-retention validation or fabrication approval.
The fixture does not claim SD-card compatibility, timing accuracy, ESD robustness, manufacturability or production readiness.
